title: Mother's Day
description:
FloridaMAMA Day

Explore a world of immersive art with your mom this Mother's Day, play scavenger hunts, and make new memories together! Can't make it on Mother's Day? Gift your mom a FloridaRAMA gift basket & make plans to come on a later date.  We are offering 4 drinks for $20 and a 4 pack of tickets for $88! 

The first 50 guests receive a complimentary glitter flower.

title: May the Fourth Be With You @ FloridaRAMA
description: Celebrate May the 4th at FloridaRAMA, costumes are encouraged! Use code MAYFOURTH for $4 off admission, grab a 4-pack of tickets for $88, and enjoy Cheers o’ RAMA with 4 drinks for $20.

title: FloridaRAMA OneBlood Donation Bus
description:
Join us at FloridaRAMA on June 14 from 12 PM to 5 PM as we partner with OneBlood for a special blood drive on World Blood Donor Day.
Did you know June 14th is World Blood Donor Day? It is the perfect opportunity to make a real impact in someone’s life.
Donate blood on the OneBlood bus outside FloridaRAMA and receive free admission to FloridaRAMA as our thank you for helping save lives.
One donation can help save multiple lives, and after giving back, you can step inside and experience the immersive magic of FloridaRAMA.
RSVP here: https://www.oneblood.org/donate-now/scheduler.html?locationId=1773959

title: FloridaRAMA Ice Cream Social
description:
Join us for an unforgettable night inside the gallery as we turn up the energy with a live DJ. In celebration of Chad Mize’s newest installation and the opening of REALM, this after-hours party invites guests to experience FloridaRAMA in a whole new way.
Explore the gallery, vibe with the music and dance the night away surrounded by bold art.

title: Rally Recover Repeat at FloridaRAMA
description:
Steps from the court, miles from reality.
Take a break between matches and step into the immersive world of FloridaRAMA with our special Tournament Pass. For just $40, enjoy unlimited entry for 4 full days, giving you the freedom to explore, recharge and return as often as you’d like throughout the tournament.
Wander through immersive art installations, discover hidden details, snap unforgettable photos and escape into a world far beyond the court, all just steps away from the action at SPA.
Your tournament weekend just got a lot more colorful.
4 Day FloridaRAMA Tournament Pass. Unlimited entry for 4 full days. Only $40.
Play hard. Explore harder.

title: Members VIP Reception
description: CELEBRATING NEW ART INSTALLATIONS with artists Chad Mize & Brigitte Coovert. RSVP to Jessica@FloridaRAMA.art

title: Celebrate Memorial Day Weekend at FloridaRAMA
description:
Celebrate Memorial Day Weekend at FloridaRAMA with immersive art, creative fun and special holiday deals!

Gather your crew and step miles from reality with our Memorial Day Weekend specials:

• 4 drinks for $30 sip your way through the surreal with friends

• 4-pack admission tickets for just $88 the perfect group adventure

Then join us on Monday for a special free community art activity: Draw Your Hero. Create a tribute to someone who inspires you, whether it’s a veteran, a family member, a friend or your personal everyday hero. All ages are welcome, and materials will be provided.

Spend your long weekend exploring immersive art, making memories and celebrating the heroes who matter most at FloridaRAMA.

title: Celebrate Dad at FloridaRAMA!
description:
Make Father’s Day weekend unforgettable with special family deals at FloridaRAMA.
4 admission tickets for $88
4 drinks for $30
BOGO free mini golf with the purchase of a scavenger hunt
Explore immersive art and interactive fun while making memories with Dad. Whether you are celebrating with family or treating the father figures in your life, FloridaRAMA is the perfect place to play, discover and celebrate together.

title: One by One
description: One by One, a new art exhibit curated by Luke Heath, opens July 3rd from 7-10 PM at the FloridaRAMA Art Gallery. The exhibition features 72 artists and 144 artworks, offering a wide-ranging collection within FloridaRAMA’s vibrant gallery space.

title: REALM Artist Talk
description: REALM Artist Talk at FloridaRAMA Art Gallery takes place on Saturday, June 13th from 6-8 PM. This free event at 2606 Fairfield Ave S in St. Petersburg invites guests to hear directly from the artist, explore the ideas behind the work and engage in a conversation about process, inspiration and creative practice.
